signals.framework: vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript with Python static build
signals.palette: raw hex custom properties in site/styles.css
signals.motion: CSS and vanilla JavaScript only; no motion library
signals.spacing: ad hoc rem and clamp values; no semantic 4-point token scale
signals.design_system: no design.md and no prior Hallmark tokens

preserve: analysis model and generated data contract
Korean report copy and information architecture
local Wikimedia Commons player portraits and attribution
existing accessible tab and control behavior
introduce: responsive side-rail navigation and mobile disclosure
